summary: All three requested changes appear implemented: narration script generation no longer prepends speaker labels while retaining speaker metadata for voice selection; a new Voice Style UI and voice-loading hook were added and the selected voices are applied to SpeechSynthesisUtterance during playback with a fallback message when voices aren’t available; and Miles’ illustration alt text (including the first panel) now explicitly describes him as Black with curly hair while preserving the “Why am I stuck to the ceiling?!” line.
